data.content: Implementation review approved. All 5 beat-ID display surfaces correctly use displayBeatLabel() showing first alias when available, falling back to stripped ID. Copy-on-click still passes raw beat.id preserving debug workflow. loadedDetailQuery added for loaded-beat alias access, shares cache with existing detail queries. Contract test updated. All quality gates pass (0 lint errors, typecheck clean, 2206/2206 tests pass).
